mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_code AS commentCode, c.notice_code AS noticeCode, c.user_code AS userCode, u.name AS userName, c.content AS content, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.updated_at AS updatedAt, c.is_deleted AS isDeleted, c.deleted_at AS deletedAt, c.deleted_by_code AS deletedByCode, du.name AS deletedByName FROM comments c JOIN notices n ON n.notice_code = c.notice_code JOIN vw_user_auth a ON a.project_code = n.project_code AND a.user_code = #{loginUserCode} AND a.status = 'OD1' LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_code = c.user_code LEFT JOIN users du ON du.user_code = c.deleted_by_code WHERE c.notice_code = #{noticeCode} ORDER BY c.comment_code DESC

SELECT c.comment_code AS commentCode, c.notice_code AS noticeCode, c.user_code AS userCode, u.name AS userName, c.content AS content, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.updated_at AS updatedAt, c.is_deleted AS isDeleted, c.deleted_at AS deletedAt, c.deleted_by_code AS deletedByCode FROM comments c JOIN notices n ON n.notice_code = c.notice_code JOIN vw_user_auth a ON a.project_code = n.project_code AND a.user_code = #{loginUserCode} AND a.status = 'OD1' LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_code = c.user_code WHERE c.comment_code = #{commentCode}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(comment_code), 0) + 1 FROM comments
INSERT INTO comments ( comment_code, notice_code, user_code, content, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{commentCode}, #{noticeCode}, #{userCode}, #{content}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET content = #{content}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE comment_code = #{commentCode} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE comments SET is_deleted = 1, deleted_at = SYSTIMESTAMP, deleted_by_code = #{deletedByCode}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE comment_code = #{commentCode} AND is_deleted = 0
